topic: Connection Pooling với PgBouncer: Session vs Transaction vs Statement mode
summary: PgBouncer pool connections để PostgreSQL không phải fork process mới mỗi lần. Transaction mode: connection trả về pool sau mỗi transaction (hiệu quả nhất). Session mode: 1 connection per app session. Statement mode: ít feature nhất.
problem: PostgreSQL fork 1 process cho mỗi connection: 500 connections = 500 processes. Với .NET app chạy Kubernetes với 50 replicas × 10 pool size = 500 connections. PostgreSQL memory: 5–10MB/connection = 2.5–5GB chỉ cho connections.
solution: PgBouncer transaction mode: 1000 app connections → 50 actual DB connections. Pool size nhỏ hơn nhiều. max_connections PostgreSQL có thể giảm xuống 100–200.
codeExample:
# pgbouncer.ini
[databases]
myapp = host=postgres port=5432 dbname=myapp

[pgbouncer]
pool_mode = transaction          # transaction mode — most efficient
max_client_conn = 1000           # app connections
default_pool_size = 50           # actual DB connections
min_pool_size = 10
server_idle_timeout = 600
client_idle_timeout = 0

# Transaction mode limitations:
# - Session-level advisory locks KHÔNG work (use xact locks)
# - SET LOCAL bị reset
# - PREPARE/DEALLOCATE cần server_reset_query
# - LISTEN/NOTIFY không work

# Session mode — phù hợp khi cần session features
# pool_mode = session
# (mỗi client session giữ 1 DB connection suốt thời gian)

# Monitoring
# psql -h pgbouncer -p 6432 -U pgbouncer pgbouncer
# SHOW POOLS;
# SHOW CLIENTS;
# SHOW SERVERS;

# .NET connection string → trỏ vào PgBouncer thay PostgreSQL
# Host=pgbouncer;Port=6432;Database=myapp;Username=app;Password=...;
# Pooling=false (PgBouncer là pooler, không cần Npgsql pooling thêm)
tradeoffs: Transaction mode: không dùng session features (advisory locks, SET, PREPARE, LISTEN). Kiểm tra compatibility
Npgsql đã có built-in connection pool: với PgBouncer transaction mode, tắt Npgsql pooling để tránh double pooling
PgBouncer single-threaded: với >10K connections/s, xem xét Odyssey (multi-threaded) hoặc pgpool-II
SSL termination: PgBouncer có thể terminate SSL từ app, kết nối PostgreSQL qua trusted network

selfVerification.method: Đo số connections thực tế trên PostgreSQL: SHOW POOLS trong PgBouncer console
